title: スマホって時間泥棒じゃん？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to oversee today's training session,
when...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uuugh. I'm so booored.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Like... bored outta my miiiiind.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, crap, how long have you been here? Talk
about cringe.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, it's almost time to train, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But here I am, doomscrolling on my phone and
playing with my split ends.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's just like... I dunno, I'm not exactly feeling the
training vibes, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'll do the training and whatever, but...
Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's got to be something I can say to her to
boost her motivation...
choice_data_list: Why don't you run a lap, and I'll time it for you?

How about you jog somewhere different than
usual?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Only one lap? That's barely anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that a good way to kick-start her
motivation is simply to begin, even if it's from
somewhere small.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so it's like when I've gotta clean my room.
All right, say less. I'll give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And well, if I'm gonna run, I may as well go super
hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on how happy Tosen Jordan looks running,
it seems she wasn't actually that averse to training
after all.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What for? A change of pace or something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that doing something different will
provide the push she needs to break out of the
rut she's in.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh. Come to think of it, I was always hella
stoked when we got to have class outside in
elementary school.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
We were still studying the same ol' boring stuff,
but it just hit different—like we were on a mini
field trip.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I see now. It's just like that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll go find somewhere to run. Thanks for
the pep talk! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on how quickly Tosen Jordan goes off to
run, it seems like all she needed was a little push.
